name: Zoom Burst
description: Radial zoom blur emanating from the mouse cursor, simulating a long-exposure lens-zoom pull. Each pixel samples along the ray from the focal point through its screen position, accumulating N samples at increasing zoom magnifications with tapering weights. Bass pulses the burst radius for beat-synchronised explosions; mids introduce a slight spiral rotation per sample for a spin-zoom hybrid; treble adds chromatic fringing along burst rays.
